SEC Drops Long-Running Lawsuit Against Ripple Labs** | YES | HIGH confidence[1][2]

The U.S. SEC's decision to drop its lawsuit against Ripple has been confirmed as resolved in April 2026, removing a major regulatory overhang that suppressed XRP's price for years and driving a 10% weekly surge to ~$1.42 after breaking $1.50 resistance[1].
